calendar.matters:
Petition To Determine Existence And Internal Affairs Of A Trust And To Determine Whether Successor Trustee John David Barry Shall Be Deemed To Have Predeceased Settlor Latonya Rogers By Clear And Convincing Evidence Of Undue Influence
Off Calendar Dec-12-2023 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Robert Cowan appeared via zoom for and with Arlevia Rogers (Petitioner).

Mr. Cowan stated that he prefers to put the case on hold until the related civil matter is resolved. The matter is ordered off calendar.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Wan. Not reported.

Petition To Determine Existence And Internal Affairs Of A Trust And To Determine Whether Successor Trustee John David Barry Shall Be Deemed To Have Predeceased Settlor Latonya Rogers By Clear And Convincing Evidence Of Undue Influence
Off Calendar Sep-19-2023 Continued To Dec-12-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Robert Cowan appeared via zoom for Arlevia Rogers (petitioner).
William Broderick appeared via zoom for John Berry (trustee).

Mr. Cowan stated that currently the related Civil matter is pending discovery, that the outcome from discovery will be used to address the examiners notes, that Mr. Berry is apart of the of the Civil matter, and that he expects to amend the complaint. Petition to determine existence and internal affairs of trust etc., is continued to December 12, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Cabrera. Not reported.
